questions.question: You are building a Fabric notebook named MasterNotebook1 that contains a DAG configuration to execute other notebooks. The notebooks must execute in the following order: Notebook_03 → Notebook_01 → Notebook_02. Which two actions should you perform?

options.A: Move the declaration of Notebook_02 to the bottom of the DAG definition.
options.B: Add dependencies to the execution of Notebook_03.
options.C: Split the DAG definition into three separate definitions.
options.D: Add dependencies to the execution of Notebook_02.
options.F: Move the declaration of Notebook_03 to the top of the DAG definition.

questions.question: You have a Fabric workspace that contains a data pipeline named Pipeline1 with two activities: Copy_kdi and Execute procedure1. What will occur the next time Pipeline1 runs?

options.A: Copy_kdi runs first, then Execute procedure1.
options.B: Execute procedure1 runs first, then Copy_kdi.
options.C: Execute procedure1 runs and Copy_kdi is skipped.
options.D: Copy_kdi runs and Execute procedure1 is skipped.

questions.question: You need to ensure that WorkspaceA can be configured for source control. Which two actions should you perform?

options.A: Enable 'Users can synchronize workspace items with their Git repositories' in Tenant settings.
options.B: Enable 'Users can sync workspace items with GitHub repositories' in Tenant settings.
options.C: Configure WorkspaceA to use a Premium Per User (PPU) license.

questions.question: You must grant a user access to the Customer table but prevent access to the CreditCard column.
You have a Fabric deployment pipeline with Dev, Test, and Prod workspaces. You must deploy an Eventhouse as part of the process. What should you use?
You have a Fabric warehouse that stores sales data and must implement row-level security so that sales representatives only see their own data. Which warehouse object is required?
You must implement row-level security in a Fabric warehouse so that users only see their own data. Which warehouse object defines the security rule?

A Fabric warehouse fact table has grown from 200 million rows to 500 million rows and Direct Lake reports show degraded performance. What should you do to improve performance with minimal operational cost?
You must deploy a Fabric warehouse to another workspace and verify whether it contains invalid references with minimal development effort. What should you use?
Deploy Feature1 from the Development workspace to the Test workspace using a deployment pipeline.
